above_threshold_bin_count: How many visible hex bins have density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?
Count the visible hex bins whose density level is {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}.
Using the legend, how many visible hex bins are density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?
What is the number of visible hex bins with density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?
Compare each visible hex bin to level {density_threshold_level}. How many are {density_threshold_phrase} that level?
below_threshold_bin_count: How many visible hex bins have density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?

What is the number of visible hex bins with density level {density_threshold_phrase} {density_threshold_level}?
Compare each visible hex bin to level {density_threshold_level}. How many are {density_threshold_phrase} that level?

query:above_threshold_bin_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:above_threshold_bin_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the center of every visible hex bin matching the density-level threshold

query:below_threshold_bin_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:below_threshold_bin_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the center of every visible hex bin matching the density-level threshold
